title: PUT does not type/range-validate year and isbn
evidence: app.py:213-219 append year/isbn to the UPDATE unconditionally, while create_book validates them via validate_book (app.py:69-80)
suggestion: Run validate_book on the provided fields in update_book for consistent validation

title: Author filter uses unescaped LIKE substring match
evidence: app.py:143 uses `author LIKE ?` with f'%{author}%'; '%' or '_' in the query act as SQL wildcards
suggestion: Escape LIKE metacharacters or document that the filter is a substring match

title: No pinned dependency file (requirements.txt/pyproject.toml)
evidence: run dir has no requirements.txt; README.md:22 instructs `pip install flask` with no version
suggestion: Add a requirements.txt pinning flask for reproducible installs

title: Partial updates supported beyond spec
evidence: app.py:195-225 builds the UPDATE dynamically from provided fields; test_update_book_partial (test_api.py:218) exercises it
suggestion: None — positive enhancement over the CRUD spec
